sprints.name: Project Scaffolding & AppleScript Engine
sprints.theme: Build the foundation — project structure, CLI skeleton, and the core AppleScript execution layer that everything else depends on.

sprints.name: Accounts & Mailboxes
sprints.theme: First real commands — list accounts and mailboxes with full output formatting.

sprints.name: Message Listing & Show
sprints.theme: Read email from the terminal — list messages with filters and show individual messages.

sprints.name: Cross-Account Search
sprints.theme: Find any message across all accounts without knowing where it lives.

sprints.name: Compose & Safety Model
sprints.theme: Create emails with an ironclad draft-first safety model.

sprints.name: Reply & Forward
sprints.theme: Respond to and forward existing messages with the same safety guarantees.

sprints.name: Message Updates
sprints.theme: Triage your inbox — mark, flag, and file messages without leaving the terminal.

sprints.name: Draft Editing & Delete
sprints.theme: Complete the write story — edit drafts and delete messages.

sprints.name: Doctor Command & Error Polish
sprints.theme: Make failures helpful — diagnostics command and polished error messages everywhere.

sprints.name: Shell Completions, Help & Integration Tests
sprints.theme: Polish and professional finish — completions, help text, and real-world testing.
